_readme: Public CDN URLs for post_calendar assets, hosted via Higgsfield media_upload
(permanent CloudFront URLs, verified public). This is the --url source for
publish_instagram.py. Hosting flow (needs a Claude session for the MCP
calls): media_upload(filename) -> curl PUT to upload_url -> media_confirm
-> record the cloudfront url here. Uploaded 2026-07-19.
note_ep1: hosted file = ep1_v6.mp4 (59.7s, -14.0 LUFS, bridge clip + mix-up ending + logo outro, 2026-07-19). Supersedes v5. Instagram ingests from THIS url — re-host and update this key whenever the cut changes, or IG silently republishes the old edit.
